text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Tch. I keep sayin' this injury's no big deal, but
they won't stop tellin' me to rest.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Is my engine goin' rusty? Am I gettin' weaker?
choice_data_list: You shouldn't push yourself too hard.
You shouldn't push yourself too hard.
Let's just get that engine running clean again!
Let's just get that engine running clean again!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Is my engine goin' rusty? Am I gettin' weaker?
choice_data_list: You shouldn't push yourself too hard.
You shouldn't push yourself too hard.
Let's just get that engine running clean again!
Let's just get that engine running clean again!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I've got a rival to beat. There's no rest
when I'm tryin' to get to the top.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No little injury like this is gonna stop me.
choice_data_list:
Broken motorcycles can't go anywhere, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...I guess it'd be even lamer if I stalled out in the
middle of the road.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'll get back out there after some maintenance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reflecting on her condition, Vodka agrees
to focus on resting in order to speed up her
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to go vroom 'round the track!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can't let Scarlet see me lookin' this pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Might be askin' the impossible, but when push
comes to shove, I gotta do what I gotta do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka says this and resumes her training, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Owww!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I thought I could handle it, but even just a light jog is rough.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and laugh. I was all confident earlier,
but now look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having pushed herself past her limits, and
perhaps also due to the mental slump
accompanying it, Vodka has wound up
prolonging her recovery time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Really?! Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right, then! Say no more!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Time for one more sprint, partner!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
These engines are one of a kind! Rev 'em up and
they spit fire!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just you watch. Everyone else'll be cowed by my
might and I won't give 'em a single inch!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It'll be me and me only! Pedal to the metal and
leadin' the pack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admirably, Vodka gets through her training!
